backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing payment submission, Stripe checkout integration, and user profile management with role-based access control (admin/user) enforced via an AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for the 'Payment service not ready' error, referencing the affected files (PaymentForm.tsx, useQueries.ts) and test ID REQ-31.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's purpose, used as build-planning documentation for the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines light/dark OKLCH CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root at #root and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with simple state-based routing between PaymentPage (default) and AdminPage, passing navigation callbacks as props.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginGate.t: Admin login gate UI component with an amber-accented light design that prompts unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity before accessing the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: Payment form component that gates submission on actor readiness (showing a 'Connecting…' spinner/disabled state), delegates to useSubmitPayment for mutation logic, and renders a success screen on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an anonymous or authenticated ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentForm.ts: Custom hook managing payment form state, input formatting (card number, expiry date), per-field validation, and touched/error tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks: `useSubmitPayment` for submitting payment data to the backend canister actor, and `useGetAllPayments` for fetching all payments when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing fonts and Tailwind, defining a warm neutral + amber OKLCH color palette, semantic CSS tokens, and reusable component classes for payment cards, inputs, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays a paginated table of all payments (with masked card numbers and formatted amounts), gating access behind Internet Identity login and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Public-facing payment page that renders the `PaymentForm` component within a styled layout including a header with SSL badge and an optional Admin navigation button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens including OKLCH-based color palettes (amber, neutral, semantic colors), typography, border radius, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a payment form web app with known issues (admin panel load failure, payment submission errors) and a list of existing implemented features.
